sections.title: Allergy-Friendly Menu
items: Guests may consult with a manager at any restaurant within Universal Studios Hollywood, or a chef at The Three Broomsticks or Toadstool Cafe restaurants, before placing an allergy-friendly order. Our culinary staff makes reasonable efforts to accommodate any dietary requests, but we cannot guarantee that all requests are met. While we use reasonable efforts to prevent cross-contact, we do not have separate food preparation facilities and use shared equipment and preparation areas and are therefore unable to guarantee that any menu item is allergen-free. Universal Studios Hollywood relies on supplier ingredient labels and cannot guarantee the accuracy of the contents of each menu item. Guests should use their discretion in determining if our menu offerings are appropriate for their dietary needs.
